runtime_guardrails.current_java_blocker: unqualified java is not on PATH in this verifier shell; Homebrew OpenJDK 21.0.11 works with explicit JAVA_HOME/PATH and all Maven/root checks passed that way
runtime_guardrails.docker_29_testcontainers_compatibility: apps/api/pom.xml pins Testcontainers 1.21.4 because Docker 29 rejects older Docker API versions used by the inherited Testcontainers stack.
runtime_guardrails.backend_baseline: Spring Boot, Java 21, Maven Wrapper, PostgreSQL, Flyway, OpenAPI/springdoc required for public/admin API slices
runtime_guardrails.schema_scope_for_active_sprint: avoid; only append-only post-V004 read index migration if necessary
runtime_guardrails.admin_scope_for_active_sprint: backend admin API only; apps/admin UI/scaffold is out of scope for this contract
runtime_guardrails.generated_client_scope_for_active_sprint: required note; update artifacts only if generation exists or is introduced by builder
runtime_guardrails.content_runtime_source_of_truth: CMS/PostgreSQL after implementation; docs are canonical planning sources only
pii_guardrails_for_active_sprint: no raw invite-code persistence or response display
do not expose lookup_hash or activation_subject_ref
do not expose employee fullName/email/phone in this status response
no personal financial answers, diagnostics weak zones or exact financial data
no real employee/customer data in tests/fixtures/evidence
admin auth/role/audit policy and production real-data use remain human-gated
